extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE Christophe escaped at 3km with breakaway remnants, soloed last 200m after yellow jersey domestique duty all Tour
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma sent green jersey Van Aert to front through final 10km roundabouts, sacrificing sprint leadout for GC safety.
Laporte bridged solo to front group at 1km, catching three riders easily while knowing sprint teams hesitated behind.
Wright Fred attacked from breakaway inside 1km, forcing late selection before pure sprinters could organize behind.

rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: Jumbo domestique showed stage-winning legs after working for yellow all Tour, suggesting team underutilized his sprint capability
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: Deployed for GC protection through technical finale rather than sprint leadout, revealing Jumbo's risk hierarchy on windy flat stages
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Team prioritized crash avoidance over Van Aert sprint at 3-2-1 advantage, making Van Aert navigate final 10km of roundabouts
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: positive: British rider initiated final km attack from breakaway, nearly holding off late-bridging Laporte for best Tour result
